headline: Is It Time To Reassess Fair Isaac (FICO) After Its Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: If you are wondering whether Fair Isaac is still worth your attention at today’s price, starting with a clear look at what you are paying for is the first step. The stock most recently closed at US$1,464.01, after a 12.5% gain over the past 7 days, a 0.9% move over 30 days, a 10.9% decline year to date and a 21.8% decline over the last year, with a very large return over 3 years and a 219.1% return over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Fair Isaac’s position as a key player in credit...
